title: lotus hispidus var. fallax
intro: Lotus hispidus var. fallax, also known as the hairy lotus or fallax lotus, is a type of lotus plant that belongs to the family Nelumbonaceae. It is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Lotus hispidus var. fallax is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots and rhizomes are also used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments, to support overall health and well-being.
